case_title: SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION VS TAYLOR VERONICA et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO POSTAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAYLOR VERONICA TAYLOR LUCILLE $1,742.52 PRINCIPAL, $51.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,793.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED. NOT ALLOWED TO GET PERSONAL MAIL AT THEIR WORK LOCATION.

SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TAYLOR LUCILLE
